tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: Are you enjoying your new job?
Y: _________
options: A) I'm getting used to it.
B) I used to enjoy it.
C) I'm used to enjoy it.

items.stem:
X: I haven't seen Tom for ages. Do you know what he's up to?
Y: _________
options: A) He's been travelling since last month.
B) He travelled since last month.
C) He was travelling since last month.

items.stem:
X: Could you give me a hand with these boxes?
Y: _________
options: A) Sure, I'll carry them for you.
B) Sure, I carry them for you.
C) Sure, I'm carrying them for you.

items.stem:
X: Do you fancy going to the cinema tonight?
Y: _________
options: A) I'd love to, but I have to work late.
B) I'd love, but I have to work late.
C) I love to, but I have to work late.

items.stem:
X: I've just passed my driving test!
Y: _________
options: A) Well done! You should be proud of you.
B) Well done! You must be so pleased.
C) Well done! You must be so pleasing.

items.stem:
X: Sorry, but I don't think I can make it to your party.
Y: _________
options: A) That's a pity. Maybe the next time.
B) That's a pity. Maybe next time.
C) That's pity. Maybe next time.
